579	class FlashAttentionForwardSm80(FlashAttentionForwardBase):
580	    def _get_smem_layout_atom(self):
581	        sQ_layout_atom = sm80_utils.get_smem_layout_atom(self.dtype, self.tile_hdim)
582	        sK_layout_atom = sQ_layout_atom
583	        sV_layout_atom = sm80_utils.get_smem_layout_atom(self.dtype, self.tile_hdimv)
584	        sO_layout_atom = sV_layout_atom
585	        sP_layout_atom = None
586	        return sQ_layout_atom, sK_layout_atom, sV_layout_atom, sO_layout_atom, sP_layout_atom
587	
588	    def _get_tiled_mma(self):
589	        tiled_mma_qk = cute.make_tiled_mma(
590	            warp.MmaF16BF16Op(self.dtype, Float32, (16, 8, 16)),
591	            (self.num_threads // 32, 1, 1),
592	            permutation_mnk=(self.num_threads // 32 * 16, 16, 16),
593	        )
594	        tiled_mma_pv = cute.make_tiled_mma(
595	            warp.MmaF16BF16Op(self.dtype, Float32, (16, 8, 16)),
596	            (self.num_threads // 32, 1, 1),
597	            permutation_mnk=(self.num_threads // 32 * 16, 16, 16),
598	        )
599	        return tiled_mma_qk, tiled_mma_pv
600	
601	    def _get_shared_storage_cls(self):
602	        sQ_struct, sK_struct, sV_struct = [
603	            cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cute.cosize(layout)], 1024]
604	            for layout in (self.sQ_layout, self.sK_layout, self.sV_layout)
605	        ]
606	        cosize_sQV = max(cute.cosize(self.sQ_layout), cute.cosize(self.sV_layout))
607	        sQV_struct = cute.struct.Align[cute.struct.MemRange[self.dtype, cosize_sQV], 1024]
608	
609	        @cute.struct
610	        class SharedStorageQKV:
611	            sV: sV_struct
612	            sQ: sQ_struct
613	            sK: sK_struct
614	
615	        @cute.struct
616	        class SharedStorageSharedQV:
617	            sQ: sQV_struct
618	            sK: sK_struct
619	
620	        return SharedStorageQKV if const_expr(not self.Q_in_regs) else SharedStorageSharedQV
621	
622	    @cute.jit
623	    def __call__(
624	        self,
625	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
626	        mK: cute.Tensor,
627	        mV: cute.Tensor,
628	        mO: cute.Tensor,
629	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
630	        softmax_scale: Float32,
631	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
632	        mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
633	        mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
634	        mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
635	        mPageTable: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
636	        window_size_left: Optional[Int32] = None,
637	        window_size_right: Optional[Int32] = None,
638	        learnable_sink: Optional[cute.Tensor] = None,
639	        blocksparse_tensors: Optional[BlockSparseTensors] = None,
640	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
641	        # Always keep stream as the last parameter (EnvStream: obtained implicitly via TVM FFI).
642	        stream: cuda.CUstream = None,
643	    ):
644	        """Configures and launches the flash attention kernel.
645	
646	        mQ/mK/mV/mO has same data types(supports fp16 and bf16) and same layout:
647	        (batch_size, seqlen_q, num_head, head_dim):(_, _, _, 1)
648	        """
649	        assert learnable_sink is None, "Learnable sink is not supported in this kernel"
650	        self._check_type(
651	            *(t.element_type if t is not None else None for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mO, mLSE, mCuSeqlensQ, mCuSeqlensK, mSeqUsedQ, mSeqUsedK))
652	        )
653	        tiled_mma_qk, tiled_mma_pv = self._get_tiled_mma()
654	        self.num_mma_threads = tiled_mma_pv.size
655	        self.num_producer_threads = self.num_threads
656	        self.num_Q_load_threads = self.num_threads
657	        self.num_epilogue_threads = self.num_threads
658	        # self.use_tma_O = self.arch >= 90 and mCuSeqlensQ is None
659	        self.use_tma_O = self.arch >= Arch.sm_90
660	        self._setup_attributes()
661	        SharedStorage = self._get_shared_storage_cls()
662	        mQ, mK, mV, mO = [assume_tensor_aligned(t) for t in (mQ, mK, mV, mO)]
663	        # Layout permutation: 4D non-varlen vs 3D varlen
664	        QO_layout_transpose = [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [0, 2, 1]
665	        KV_layout_transpose = [1, 3, 2, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensK is None) else [0, 2, 1]
666	        mQ, mO = [
667	            cute.make_tensor(t.iterator, cute.select(t.layout, mode=QO_layout_transpose))
668	            for t in (mQ, mO)
669	        ]
670	        mK, mV = [
671	            cute.make_tensor(t.iterator, cute.select(t.layout, mode=KV_layout_transpose))
672	            for t in (mK, mV)
673	        ]
674	        if const_expr(mLSE is not None):
675	            LSE_layout_transpose = [2, 1, 0] if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is None) else [1, 0]
676	            mLSE = cute.make_tensor(mLSE.iterator, cute.select(mLSE.layout, mode=LSE_layout_transpose))
677	        # TileScheduler for varlen, simple grid for non-varlen
678	        if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None or mSeqUsedQ is not None):
679	            TileScheduler = SingleTileVarlenScheduler
680	        else:
681	            TileScheduler = SingleTileScheduler
682	        num_batch = (
683	            mCuSeqlensQ.shape[0] - 1
684	            if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None)
685	            else mQ.shape[3]
686	        )
687	        tile_sched_args = TileSchedulerArguments(
688	            num_block=cute.ceil_div(mQ.shape[0], self.tile_m),
689	            num_head=cute.size(mQ.shape[2]),
690	            num_batch=num_batch,
691	            num_splits=1,
692	            seqlen_k=0,
693	            headdim=mQ.shape[1],
694	            headdim_v=mV.shape[1],
695	            total_q=cute.size(mQ.shape[0])
696	            if const_expr(mCuSeqlensQ is not None)
697	            else cute.size(mQ.shape[0]) * cute.size(mQ.shape[3]),
698	            tile_shape_mn=(self.tile_m, self.tile_n),
699	            qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
700	            mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
701	            mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedQ,
702	        )
703	        tile_sched_params = TileScheduler.to_underlying_arguments(tile_sched_args)
704	        grid_dim = TileScheduler.get_grid_shape(tile_sched_params)
705	        softmax_scale_log2, softmax_scale = utils.compute_softmax_scale_log2(softmax_scale, self.score_mod)
706	        fastdiv_mods = utils.compute_fastdiv_mods(mQ, mK, self.qhead_per_kvhead, self.pack_gqa, aux_data.tensors)
707	
708	        self.kernel(
709	            mQ,
710	            mK,
711	            mV,
712	            mO,
713	            mLSE,
714	            mCuSeqlensQ,
715	            mCuSeqlensK,
716	            mSeqUsedQ,
717	            mSeqUsedK,
718	            softmax_scale_log2,
719	            softmax_scale,
720	            window_size_left,
721	            window_size_right,
722	            self.sQ_layout,
723	            self.sK_layout,
724	            self.sV_layout,
725	            self.sO_layout,
726	            self.sP_layout,
727	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_Q,
728	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_K,
729	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_V,
730	            self.gmem_tiled_copy_O,
731	            tiled_mma_qk,
732	            tiled_mma_pv,
733	            SharedStorage,
734	            tile_sched_params,
735	            TileScheduler,
736	            aux_data,
737	            fastdiv_mods,
738	        ).launch(
739	            grid=grid_dim,
740	            block=[self.num_threads, 1, 1],
741	            smem=SharedStorage.size_in_bytes(),
742	            stream=stream,
743	        )
744	
745	    @cute.kernel
746	    def kernel(
747	        self,
748	        mQ: cute.Tensor,
749	        mK: cute.Tensor,
750	        mV: cute.Tensor,
751	        mO: cute.Tensor,
752	        mLSE: Optional[cute.Tensor],
753	        mCuSeqlensQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
754	        mCuSeqlensK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
755	        mSeqUsedQ: Optional[cute.Tensor],
756	        mSeqUsedK: Optional[cute.Tensor],
757	        softmax_scale_log2: Float32,
758	        softmax_scale: Optional[Float32],
759	        window_size_left: Optional[Int32],
760	        window_size_right: Optional[Int32],
761	        sQ_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
762	        sK_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
763	        sV_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
764	        sO_layout: cute.ComposedLayout,
765	        sP_layout: cute.ComposedLayout | None,
766	        gmem_tiled_copy_Q: cute.TiledCopy,
767	        gmem_tiled_copy_K: cute.TiledCopy,
768	        gmem_tiled_copy_V: cute.TiledCopy,
769	        gmem_tiled_copy_O: cute.TiledCopy,
770	        tiled_mma_qk: cute.TiledMma,
771	        tiled_mma_pv: cute.TiledMma,
772	        SharedStorage: cutlass.Constexpr,
773	        tile_sched_params,
774	        TileScheduler: cutlass.Constexpr[Callable],
775	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
776	        fastdiv_mods=None,
777	    ):
778	        # Thread index, block index
779	        tidx, _, _ = cute.arch.thread_idx()
780	
781	        tile_scheduler = TileScheduler.create(tile_sched_params)
782	        work_tile = tile_scheduler.initial_work_tile_info()
783	        m_block, num_head, batch_size, _ = work_tile.tile_idx
784	
785	        block_info = BlockInfo(
786	            self.tile_m,
787	            self.tile_n,
788	            self.is_causal,
789	            self.is_local,
790	            False,  # is_split_kv
791	            window_size_left,
792	            window_size_right,
793	            qhead_per_kvhead_packgqa=self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
794	        )
795	        seqlen = SeqlenInfoQK.create(
796	            batch_idx=batch_size,
797	            seqlen_q_static=mQ.shape[0],
798	            seqlen_k_static=mK.shape[0],
799	            mCuSeqlensQ=mCuSeqlensQ,
800	            mCuSeqlensK=mCuSeqlensK,
801	            mSeqUsedQ=mSeqUsedQ,
802	            mSeqUsedK=mSeqUsedK,
803	        )
804	        n_block_min, n_block_max = block_info.get_n_block_min_max(seqlen, m_block)
805	        # For varlen, wasted grid tiles (where batch_idx >= num_batch) will have
806	        # seqlen_q=seqlen_k=0 and n_block_max=0.  Clamp to 0 so we don't use a
807	        # negative block index for K/V loads; the load/store predicates already
808	        # guard all memory accesses when seqlen is 0.
809	        n_block = cutlass.max(n_block_max - 1, 0)
810	
811	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
812	        # Get the appropriate tiles for this thread block.
813	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
814	        blkQ_shape = (self.tile_m, self.tile_hdim)
815	        blkK_shape = (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim)
816	        blkV_shape = (self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv)
817	        num_head_kv = num_head // self.qhead_per_kvhead
818	        if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_q):
819	            mQ_cur = mQ[None, None, num_head, batch_size]
820	        else:
821	            mQ_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_q, 0), mQ[None, None, num_head])
822	        if const_expr(not seqlen.has_cu_seqlens_k):
823	            mK_cur = mK[None, None, num_head_kv, batch_size]
824	            mV_cur = mV[None, None, num_head_kv, batch_size]
825	        else:
826	            mK_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_k, 0), mK[None, None, num_head_kv])
827	            mV_cur = cute.domain_offset((seqlen.offset_k, 0), mV[None, None, num_head_kv])
828	        gQ = cute.local_tile(mQ_cur, blkQ_shape, (m_block, 0))
829	        gK = cute.local_tile(mK_cur, blkK_shape, (None, 0))
830	        gV = cute.local_tile(mV_cur, blkV_shape, (None, 0))
831	
832	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
833	        # Get shared memory buffer
834	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
835	        smem = cutlass.utils.SmemAllocator()
836	        storage = smem.allocate(SharedStorage)
837	        sQ = storage.sQ.get_tensor(sQ_layout)
838	        sK = storage.sK.get_tensor(sK_layout)
839	        if const_expr(not self.Q_in_regs):
840	            sV = storage.sV.get_tensor(sV_layout)
841	        else:
842	            sV = cute.make_tensor(cute.recast_ptr(sQ.iterator, dtype=self.dtype), sV_layout)
843	        # Transpose view of V to tensor with layout (head_dim_v, tile_n) for tiled mma
844	        sVt = layout_utils.transpose_view(sV)
845	
846	        gmem_thr_copy_K = gmem_tiled_copy_K.get_slice(tidx)
847	        gmem_thr_copy_V = gmem_tiled_copy_V.get_slice(tidx)
848	        # (CPY_Atom, CPY_N, CPY_K, n_block)
849	        tKsK, tKgK = gmem_thr_copy_K.partition_D(sK), gmem_thr_copy_K.partition_S(gK)
850	        # (CPY_Atom, CPY_N, CPY_K, n_block)
851	        tVsV, tVgV = gmem_thr_copy_V.partition_D(sV), gmem_thr_copy_V.partition_S(gV)
852	
853	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
854	        # Tile MMA compute thread partitions and allocate accumulators
855	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
856	        thr_mma_qk = tiled_mma_qk.get_slice(tidx)
857	        thr_mma_pv = tiled_mma_pv.get_slice(tidx)
858	        tSrQ = thr_mma_qk.make_fragment_A(thr_mma_qk.partition_A(sQ))
859	        tSrK = thr_mma_qk.make_fragment_B(thr_mma_qk.partition_B(sK[None, None, 0]))
860	        tOrVt = thr_mma_pv.make_fragment_B(thr_mma_pv.partition_B(sVt[None, None, 0]))
861	        acc_shape_O = thr_mma_pv.partition_shape_C((self.tile_m, self.tile_hdimv))
862	        acc_O = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_O, Float32)
863	        acc_O.fill(0.0)
864	
865	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
866	        # Smem copy atom tiling
867	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
868	        smem_copy_atom_QK = cute.make_copy_atom(
869	            warp.LdMatrix8x8x16bOp(transpose=False, num_matrices=4),
870	            self.dtype,
871	        )
872	        smem_copy_atom_V = cute.make_copy_atom(
873	            warp.LdMatrix8x8x16bOp(transpose=True, num_matrices=4),
874	            self.dtype,
875	        )
876	        smem_thr_copy_Q = utils.make_tiled_copy_A(smem_copy_atom_QK, tiled_mma_qk).get_slice(tidx)
877	        smem_thr_copy_K = utils.make_tiled_copy_B(smem_copy_atom_QK, tiled_mma_qk).get_slice(tidx)
878	        smem_thr_copy_V = utils.make_tiled_copy_B(smem_copy_atom_V, tiled_mma_pv).get_slice(tidx)
879	
880	        tSsQ = smem_thr_copy_Q.partition_S(sQ)
881	        tSsK = smem_thr_copy_K.partition_S(sK)
882	        tOsVt = smem_thr_copy_V.partition_S(sVt)
883	
884	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
885	        # Predicate: Mark indices that need to copy when problem_shape isn't a multiple
886	        # of tile_shape
887	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
888	        # Construct identity layout for KV
889	        cK = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_n, self.tile_hdim))
890	        tKcK = gmem_thr_copy_K.partition_S(cK)
891	        t0KcK = gmem_thr_copy_K.get_slice(0).partition_S(cK)
892	        if const_expr(self.tile_hdim == self.tile_hdimv):
893	            tVcV = tKcK
894	            t0VcV = t0KcK
895	        else:
896	            cV = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_n, self.tile_hdimv))
897	            tVcV = gmem_thr_copy_V.partition_S(cV)
898	            t0VcV = gmem_thr_copy_V.get_slice(0).partition_S(cV)
899	        # Allocate predicate tensors for m and n, here we only allocate the tile of k, and
900	        # use "if" on the mn dimension.
901	        # This is to reduce register pressure and gets 2-3% performance gain.
902	        tKpK = utils.predicate_k(tKcK, limit=mK.shape[1])
903	        if const_expr(self.same_hdim_kv):
904	            tVpV = tKpK
905	        else:
906	            tVpV = utils.predicate_k(tVcV, limit=mV.shape[1])
907	
908	        # shape: (atom_v_m * rest_m)
909	        softmax = Softmax.create(
910	            softmax_scale_log2,
911	            num_rows=acc_O.shape[0][0] * acc_O.shape[1],
912	            softmax_scale=softmax_scale,
913	        )
914	        softmax.reset()
915	
916	        # group parameters for compute_one_n_block
917	        mma_params = SimpleNamespace(
918	            thr_mma_qk=thr_mma_qk,
919	            thr_mma_pv=thr_mma_pv,
920	            tSrQ=tSrQ,
921	            tSrK=tSrK,
922	            tOrVt=tOrVt,
923	            acc_O=acc_O,
924	        )
925	        smem_copy_params = SimpleNamespace(
926	            smem_thr_copy_Q=smem_thr_copy_Q,
927	            smem_thr_copy_K=smem_thr_copy_K,
928	            smem_thr_copy_V=smem_thr_copy_V,
929	            tSsQ=tSsQ,
930	            tSsK=tSsK,
931	            tOsVt=tOsVt,
932	        )
933	        load_K = partial(
934	            self.load_K, gmem_tiled_copy_K, tKgK, tKsK, tKcK, t0KcK, tKpK, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_k
935	        )
936	        load_V = partial(
937	            self.load_V, gmem_tiled_copy_V, tVgV, tVsV, tVcV, t0VcV, tVpV, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_k
938	        )
939	
940	        compute_one_n_block = partial(
941	            self.compute_one_n_block,
942	            mma_params=mma_params,
943	            smem_copy_params=smem_copy_params,
944	            softmax=softmax,
945	            load_K=load_K,
946	            load_V=load_V,
947	            score_mod=self.score_mod,
948	            batch_idx=batch_size,
949	            head_idx=num_head,
950	            m_block=m_block,
951	            aux_data=aux_data,
952	            fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
953	        )
954	
955	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
956	        # Prologue
957	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
958	        # Start async loads of the last mn-tile, where we take care of the mn residue
959	        gmem_thr_copy_Q = gmem_tiled_copy_Q.get_slice(tidx)
960	        self.load_Q(gmem_thr_copy_Q, gQ, sQ, m_block, seqlen=seqlen.seqlen_q, headdim=mQ.shape[1])
961	        cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
962	
963	        def preprocess_Q():
964	            cute.arch.cp_async_wait_group(self.num_stages * 2 - 1)
965	            if const_expr(self.Q_in_regs):
966	                cute.arch.barrier()
967	                tSrQ_copy_view = smem_thr_copy_Q.retile(tSrQ)
968	                cute.copy(smem_thr_copy_Q, tSsQ, tSrQ_copy_view)
969	
970	        # If Q_in_regs, we load Q, then load 1 stage of K, then (optionally) rotate Q and
971	        # read from smem_q to registers, then load V.
972	        # If !Q_in_regs, we load Q, load all stages of K & V, then (optionally) rotate Q.
973	        if const_expr(self.Q_in_regs):
974	            load_K(n_block, smem_pipe_write=0, need_predicates=True)
975	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
976	            preprocess_Q()
977	            cute.arch.barrier()  # Make sure all threads have read smem_q before loading V
978	
979	        for stage in cutlass.range_constexpr(self.num_stages):
980	            if const_expr(not self.Q_in_regs or stage > 0):
981	                if stage == 0 or n_block - stage >= 0:
982	                    load_K(n_block - stage, smem_pipe_write=stage, need_predicates=stage == 0)
983	                cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
984	            if const_expr(stage < self.num_stages - 1):
985	                if stage == 0 or n_block - stage >= 0:
986	                    load_V(n_block - stage, smem_pipe_write=stage, need_predicates=stage == 0)
987	                cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
988	        if const_expr(not self.Q_in_regs):
989	            preprocess_Q()
990	
991	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
992	        # Mainloop
993	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
994	        # Start processing of the first n-block.
995	        # For performance reason, we separate out two kinds of iterations:
996	        # those that need masking on S, and those that don't.
997	        # We need masking on S for the very last block when K and V has length not multiple of tile_n.
998	        # We also need masking on S if it's causal, for the last several blocks.
999	        mask = AttentionMask(
1000	            self.tile_m,
1001	            self.tile_n,
1002	            seqlen,
1003	            window_size_left,
1004	            window_size_right,
1005	            self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1006	        )
1007	        mask_fn = partial(
1008	            mask.apply_mask,
1009	            batch_idx=batch_size,
1010	            head_idx=num_head,
1011	            m_block=m_block,
1012	            thr_mma=thr_mma_qk,
1013	            mask_causal=self.is_causal,
1014	            mask_local=self.is_local,
1015	            aux_data=aux_data,
1016	            fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods if const_expr(self.mask_mod is not None) else None,
1017	        )
1018	
1019	        # First iteration with seqlen masking
1020	        smem_pipe_read = Int32(0)
1021	        smem_pipe_write = Int32(self.num_stages - 1)
1022	        compute_one_n_block(
1023	            n_block,
1024	            smem_pipe_read,
1025	            smem_pipe_write,
1026	            is_first_n_block=True,
1027	            seqlen=seqlen,
1028	            mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=True),
1029	        )
1030	        smem_pipe_read = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_read)
1031	        smem_pipe_write = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write)
1032	        # Next couple of iterations with causal masking
1033	        if const_expr(self.is_causal or self.is_local):
1034	            n_block_min_causal_local_mask = block_info.get_n_block_min_causal_local_mask(
1035	                seqlen, m_block, n_block_min
1036	            )
1037	            for n_tile in cutlass.range(n_block_max - 1 - n_block_min_causal_local_mask, unroll=1):
1038	                n_block = n_block_max - 2 - n_tile
1039	                compute_one_n_block(
1040	                    n_block,
1041	                    smem_pipe_read,
1042	                    smem_pipe_write,
1043	                    seqlen=seqlen,
1044	                    mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=True),
1045	                )
1046	                smem_pipe_read = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_read)
1047	                smem_pipe_write = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write)
1048	        # The remaining iterations have no masking
1049	        for n_tile in cutlass.range(n_block, unroll=1):
1050	            compute_one_n_block(
1051	                n_block - n_tile - 1, smem_pipe_read, smem_pipe_write,
1052	                seqlen=seqlen, is_first_n_block=False,
1053	                mask_fn=partial(mask_fn, mask_mod=self.mask_mod, mask_seqlen=False)
1054	            )
1055	            smem_pipe_read = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_read)
1056	            smem_pipe_write = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write)
1057	        # TODO: local
1058	
1059	        # normalize acc_O by row_sum and calculate the lse
1060	        row_scale = softmax.finalize()
1061	        softmax.rescale_O(acc_O, row_scale)
1062	
1063	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1064	        # Epilogue
1065	        # ///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
1066	        # reuse sQ's data iterator
1067	        sO = cute.make_tensor(sQ.iterator, sO_layout)
1068	        self.epilogue(
1069	            acc_O,
1070	            softmax.row_sum,
1071	            mO,
1072	            mLSE,
1073	            sO,
1074	            seqlen,
1075	            gmem_tiled_copy_O,
1076	            None,
1077	            tiled_mma_pv,
1078	            tidx,
1079	            m_block,
1080	            num_head,
1081	            batch_size,
1082	        )
1083	
1084	    @cute.jit
1085	    def compute_one_n_block(
1086	        self,
1087	        n_block: Int32,
1088	        smem_pipe_read: Int32,
1089	        smem_pipe_write: Int32,
1090	        mma_params: SimpleNamespace,
1091	        smem_copy_params: SimpleNamespace,
1092	        softmax: Softmax,
1093	        load_K: Callable,
1094	        load_V: Callable,
1095	        score_mod: Callable | None,
1096	        batch_idx: cutlass.Int32,
1097	        head_idx: cutlass.Int32,
1098	        m_block: cutlass.Int32,
1099	        seqlen: SeqlenInfoQK,
1100	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
1101	        fastdiv_mods=None,
1102	        mask_fn: Optional[Callable] = None,
1103	        is_first_n_block: cutlass.Constexpr = False,
1104	        check_inf: cutlass.Constexpr = True,
1105	    ):
1106	        """Compute one n_block of S/O.
1107	
1108	        This function provides different variants for processing the first n block versus
1109	        subsequent blocks.
1110	        """
1111	
1112	        def sync():
1113	            cute.arch.cp_async_wait_group(self.num_stages * 2 - 2)
1114	            cute.arch.barrier()
1115	
1116	        acc_shape_S = mma_params.thr_mma_qk.partition_shape_C((self.tile_m, self.tile_n))
1117	        acc_S = cute.make_rmem_tensor(acc_shape_S, Float32)
1118	        acc_S.fill(0.0)
1119	        # wait for smem tile QK before mma calculation for S
1120	        sync()
1121	
1122	        # need predicates for the first tile
1123	        def load_V_next():
1124	            if self.num_stages == 1 or n_block - self.num_stages + 1 >= 0:
1125	                load_V(
1126	                    n_block - self.num_stages + 1,
1127	                    smem_pipe_write,
1128	                    need_predicates=is_first_n_block and self.num_stages == 1,
1129	                )
1130	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
1131	
1132	        load_V_next()
1133	        sm80_utils.gemm(
1134	            mma_params.thr_mma_qk,
1135	            acc_S,
1136	            mma_params.tSrQ,
1137	            mma_params.tSrK,
1138	            smem_copy_params.tSsQ,
1139	            smem_copy_params.tSsK[
1140	                None, None, None, smem_pipe_read if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1) else 0
1141	            ],
1142	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_Q,
1143	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_K,
1144	            # hook_fn=load_V_next,
1145	            A_in_regs=self.Q_in_regs,
1146	        )
1147	        if const_expr(score_mod is not None):
1148	            self.apply_score_mod(
1149	                mma_params.thr_mma_qk,
1150	                batch_idx,
1151	                head_idx,
1152	                m_block,
1153	                acc_S,
1154	                n_block,
1155	                softmax_scale=softmax.softmax_scale,
1156	                seqlen=seqlen,
1157	                aux_data=aux_data,
1158	                fastdiv_mods=fastdiv_mods,
1159	            )
1160	
1161	        smem_pipe_write = self.advance_pipeline(smem_pipe_write)
1162	
1163	        def load_K_next():
1164	            if n_block - self.num_stages >= 0:
1165	                load_K(n_block - self.num_stages, smem_pipe_write, need_predicates=False)
1166	            cute.arch.cp_async_commit_group()
1167	
1168	        # wait for smem tile V for O
1169	        if const_expr(self.num_stages == 1):
1170	            sync()
1171	            load_K_next()
1172	        if const_expr(mask_fn is not None):
1173	            mask_fn(acc_S, n_block=n_block)
1174	        row_scale = softmax.online_softmax(acc_S, is_first=is_first_n_block, check_inf=check_inf)
1175	        softmax.rescale_O(mma_params.acc_O, row_scale)
1176	        rP = cute.make_fragment_like(acc_S, self.dtype)
1177	        rP.store(acc_S.load().to(self.dtype))
1178	        tOrP = layout_utils.reshape_acc_to_frgA(rP)
1179	        if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1):
1180	            sync()
1181	            load_K_next()
1182	        sm80_utils.gemm_rs(
1183	            mma_params.thr_mma_pv,
1184	            mma_params.acc_O,
1185	            tOrP,
1186	            mma_params.tOrVt,
1187	            smem_copy_params.tOsVt[
1188	                None, None, None, smem_pipe_read if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1) else 0
1189	            ],
1190	            smem_copy_params.smem_thr_copy_V,
1191	            # hook_fn=load_K_next,
1192	        )
1193	        # if const_expr(self.num_stages > 1):
1194	        #     load_K_next()
1195	    @cute.jit
1196	    def apply_score_mod(
1197	        self,
1198	        thr_mma_qk,
1199	        batch_idx,
1200	        head_idx,
1201	        m_block,
1202	        acc_S,
1203	        n_block,
1204	        softmax_scale,
1205	        seqlen,
1206	        aux_data: AuxData = AuxData(),
1207	        fastdiv_mods=None,
1208	    ):
1209	        # Prepare index tensor
1210	        cS = cute.make_identity_tensor((self.tile_m, self.tile_n))
1211	        cS = cute.domain_offset((m_block * self.tile_m, n_block * self.tile_n), cS)
1212	        tScS = thr_mma_qk.partition_C(cS)
1213	
1214	        apply_score_mod_inner(
1215	            acc_S,
1216	            tScS,
1217	            self.score_mod,
1218	            batch_idx,
1219	            head_idx,
1220	            softmax_scale,
1221	            self.score_vec_size,
1222	            self.qk_acc_dtype,
1223	            aux_data,
1224	            fastdiv_mods,
1225	            seqlen_info=seqlen,
1226	            constant_q_idx=None,
1227	            qhead_per_kvhead=self.qhead_per_kvhead if const_expr(self.pack_gqa) else 1,
1228	        )
1229	
1230	
1231	# SM90 forward pass moved to flash_fwd_sm90.py; re-export for backward compatibility
1232	def __getattr__(name):
1233	    if name == "FlashAttentionForwardSm90":
1234	        from flash_attn.cute.flash_fwd_sm90 import FlashAttentionForwardSm90
1235	        return FlashAttentionForwardSm90
1236	    raise AttributeError(f"module {__name__!r} has no attribute {name!r}")
1237

# Copyright (c) 2025, Jay Shah, Ganesh Bikshandi, Ying Zhang, Vijay Thakkar, Pradeep Ramani, Tri Dao.
# A reimplementation of
# https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention/blob/main/hopper/flash_fwd_kernel_sm80.h
# and https://github.com/Dao-AILab/flash-attention/blob/main/hopper/flash_fwd_kernel_sm90.h
# from Cutlass C++ to Cute-DSL.
# Built on Cute-DSL example: https://github.com/NVIDIA/cutlass/blob/main/examples/python/CuTeDSL/ampere/flash_attention_v2.py

import math
from types import SimpleNamespace
from typing import Type, Callable, Optional
from functools import partial

import cuda.bindings.driver as cuda

import cutlass
import cutlass.cute as cute
from cutlass import Float32, Int32, const_expr
